description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16 Docker image with a cache on node_modules. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs `npm install -g harp less` then `harp source public`, and is triggered only for merge request events on non-default branches. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs the same two commands, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the default branch.
